name: Rio Morales [Missing Remote]
description:
[REQUEST]

When you unexpectedly arrive early using Miles' spare key, you stumble upon Rio Morales in a compromising position: frustrated, half-dressed, and frantically searching for the lost remote.

[Art Credit: Fugtrup]
